questions.question: This new series installment in 2015, starring Chris Pratt, proved we still have not learned the lesson it is a bad idea to breed dinosaurs.
True or False: Generation Z watches almost twice as much TV as Boomers.
questions.answer: False. Boomers watch twice as much
